description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where needed. Update all related Spring dependencies (Spring Data, Spring Security, Spring Web, etc.) to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4. Ensure all deprecated APIs are replaced with their modern equivalents.
tasks.summary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21 and Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Migrated javax.* imports to jakarta.*, updated commons-io to 2.18.0 (fixing CVE-2024-47554), and modernized code to use Java 21 APIs. Build passes and unit tests pass.
